title: Stock Market News From June 25, 2026: Dow Rises as Mag 7 Bleeds
extracted_text: DJIA: 51,920.62 (+0.14%). S&P 500: 7,357.49 (-0.01%). Nasdaq: 25,358.60 (-0.46%). Roundhill Mag 7 ETF (MAGS): $61.07 (-2.57%). U.S. 10Y: 4.382% (-0.296%). WTI: $71.92 (+2.2%). DXY: 101.21 (-0.22%). Mag 7 collectively shed $2.99T in June, largest monthly decline ever. All 7 Mag 7 stocks fell but S&P 500 flat — first time since Jan 14, 2025. Rotation: industrials, healthcare, materials, energy led. Apple announced MacBook/iPad price hikes citing memory cost surge. Micron reported record earnings (EPS $25.11 vs $20.78 est, revenue $41.46B). Nasdaq rose 0.9% intraday before fading — second straight failed rally. Dow crossed 52,000 for 4th time but failed to close above (record close: 51,999.67). PCE inflation report: headline 4.1% YoY, core 3.4% YoY. Oil spiked on Iranian attack on cargo ship near Strait of Hormuz.
summary: Stock Market News From June 25, 2026: Dow Rises as Mag 7 Bleeds

title: May US PCE Inflation Tops 4%, Leaves Fed Hike on the Table
extracted_text: Headline PCE: 4.1% YoY (highest since April 2023), 0.4% MoM. Core PCE: 3.4% YoY (highest since October 2023), 0.3% MoM. Energy goods +6.5% due to Middle East conflict. Services +0.5% (April +0.3%): transportation +0.8%, financial services & insurance +1.2%. Consumer spending +0.7% MoM, real spending +0.3%. Personal income +0.7%. Saving rate 3.0%. Core capital goods orders +1.6% in May. GDP Q2 tracking ~2.5% annualized. CME FedWatch: ~80% probability of rate hike at September 15-16 meeting. Scott Anderson (BMO): 'PCE price inflation remains too high and will keep the Fed on hold and mulling a potential rate hike.' Gregory Daco (EY-Parthenon): 'core inflation is likely to remain uncomfortably firm above the Fed's 2% target.'
summary: May US PCE Inflation Tops 4%, Leaves Fed Hike on the Table

title: Apple Stock Sinks 6% After Price Hikes on MacBook and iPad
extracted_text: AAPL fell 6.12% — worst single-day drop since April 2025. Price hikes: MacBook Neo $599→$699 (+$100), MacBook Air 512GB $1,099→$1,299 (+$200), MacBook Pro 1TB $1,699→$1,999 (+$300), iPad Air 128GB $599→$749 (+$150), iPad Pro WiFi 256GB $999→$1,199 (+$200). Tim Cook: 'This is a hundred-year flood. I've never seen anything like it.' Memory/storage prices quadrupled in 3 quarters (Counterpoint). Micron gross margin jumped from 39%→84.9%. Analysts expect iPhone price hikes of $150-200. After-hours: $274.88 (-0.10%).
summary: Apple Stock Sinks 6% After Price Hikes on MacBook and iPad

title: Tumbling AI Stocks Signal Another Day of Turmoil for Tech Companies
extracted_text: SoftBank Group plunged 12.53% — worst since Aug 2024. Cascading selloff: SK Hynix -8%+, Samsung -9%, SK Square -9.43%, LG Electronics -3.5%. TSMC -2.09%, Hon Hai -3.5%, Tencent -2%, Alibaba -6%+, Baidu -4.26%, SMIC -6.9%+. Europe: ASML -1.79%, Infineon -2.38%, ASMI -3.67%, STMicro -2.95%. US Thursday: AAPL -6%, MSFT -3.5%. OpenAI may delay IPO to 2027 (struggling to secure demand at $1T valuation). Qualcomm AI data center chip deal with Meta positive for Arm royalties but increases competitive pressure. Andrew Jackson (Ortus Advisors): SoftBank investor enthusiasm capped by OpenAI IPO delay.
summary: Tumbling AI Stocks Signal Another Day of Turmoil for Tech Companies

title: Treasury Yield Curve Today: June 26, 2026 — Rates & Spread Monitor
extracted_text: 10Y yield: 4.41% (-9bp June 24 session). 2Y: 4.11% (-5bp). 30Y: 4.86% (-8bp). 5Y: 4.17% (-10bp). 7Y: 4.28% (-10bp). 2s-10s spread: +0.30 pp (positive, normal curve). FOMC held at 3.50-3.75% on June 17; median dot for end-2026: 3.8% (up from 3.4% in March) — implies at least one more rate hike. 5Y breakeven inflation: 2.19%. 10Y breakeven: 2.18%. Next FOMC: July 28-29. Key data: Jobs Report July 2, CPI July 14, PCE July 30.
summary: Treasury Yield Curve Today: June 26, 2026 — Rates & Spread Monitor

title: SoftBank Shares Tumble After Report of OpenAI's IPO Delay
extracted_text: SoftBank Group Corp. stock fell the most since August 2024. OpenAI may hold off IPO until 2027, delaying returns for primary Japanese backer. OpenAI struggling to secure demand at $1 trillion valuation. SoftBank led rout, -12.53%.
summary: SoftBank Shares Tumble After Report of OpenAI's IPO Delay

title: SoftBank plunges 13%, SK Hynix slides 10% as Asia tech rout tracks US declines
extracted_text: Apple -6% after price hikes. Microsoft -3.5% after Xbox price hike. Alphabet and Meta also declined. Memory/storage prices quadrupled in 3 quarters. AI infrastructure costs increasingly threatening end-user margins. The Mag 7 group plus Broadcom and Oracle lost $2.7T in market value in June.
summary: SoftBank plunges 13%, SK Hynix slides 10% as Asia tech rout tracks US declines
